c4d406c9-7848-416d-bd47-438832b47dd2.text: subjects are auto-picked and ready for submission

0bb2cf48-7665-407c-8242-c9f8459ff8db.text: After Submission, as head. All of the regular students can be toggled as check, or select all to approve the subjects
0bb2cf48-7665-407c-8242-c9f8459ff8db.comment: when approved is makikita na rin ng registrar yung mga students who is enrolled sa subjects then pwede na sila mag release ng cor document

caa8f00f-028f-421d-8645-6e16e7f3a030.text: Student manually enroll his subjects in the system, capped at 30 units, prerequisites checking is enforced from the system

c5a209d5-e882-44d3-8dc5-7a515777cb71.text: head manually review and approve every subject advising
c5a209d5-e882-44d3-8dc5-7a515777cb71.comment: when approved is makikita na rin ng registrar yung mga students who is enrolled sa subjects then pwede na sila mag release ng cor document
